prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-MAGDRAWBOARD-PINK-20106 Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Pink Sketch Pad Magnetic Drawing Board with Magic Pen, Stamps, Girls, Ages 3+ Description: Whether your child is a mini Picasso or just loves to scribble, every child is born to create. The magnetic drawing board with drawing pen and fun-shaped heart and hexagon stamps from Kidplokio, allows little artists to draw and create for hours, without leaving a mess of papers, ink and other crafting supplies behind. No more marker stains or wasting paper with this awesome creative toy, suitable for both girls and boys alike. The magnetic drawing board comes with easy to use.

The magnetic drawing board or digital drawing tablet is a great boredom busting tool, keeping toddlers and kids busy on long trips while they enjoy drawing and writing creating, while also limiting screen time. With its lightweight and portable design, this magnetic drawing board is an ideal for throwing into a backpack or suitcase for long road trips, flights, waiting room appointments or wherever a bit of distraction is needed.

In addition to encouraging imagination, the magnetic drawing board or drawing tablet can also be used as an educational development learning tool. Help your child practice the alphabet, teach phonics or solve simple math problems with this reusable magnetic drawing board. This sketch pad for kids allows your little one to cultivate creativity, improve concentration, develop fine motor skills and enhance self-expression.

Best of all, kids won't even realize all the skills they are learning with this multifunctional educational learning tool, they will just be having fun. An ideal holiday, Hanukkah or Christmas gift for exploring creativity or as an educational tool for home school or remote learning.

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toddlers young children christmas gift hannukah gifts drawing school supplies home school work from home gifts under 20 dollars alphabet letters learning and education toys creativity travel imagination writing tablet for kids Features: - KIDS MAGNETIC DRAWING BOARD: Kidplokio's magnetic drawing pad is an easy to use, lightweight and portable toy suitable for both boys and girls! The perfect toy for getting creative at home or while on the go, little ones will enjoy hours of creativity using the included pen, stamps and magic eraser tool to practice drawing, writing and more - TODDLER LEARNING TOYS: In addition to encouraging imagination and creativity, the magnetic drawing board can be used as an educational development learning tool; Help your child practice the alphabet, teach phonics or solve simple math problems with the drawing tablet or digital sketch pad - DRAWING BOARD GREAT FOR TRAVEL: An awesome boredom busting tool, the magnetic drawing board will keep kids busy on long trips, while simultaneously limiting screen time; featuring a lightweight design and built in handle, the magnetic drawing board is easy to carry or tote in a suitcase for a long road trips, flights or appointment waiting rooms - X2 STAMPS INCLUDED: Whether your child is a mini Picasso or just loves to scribble, with the reusable magnetic drawing board they can draw, write and entertain themselves for hours; And, to make it even more fun, the digital drawing tablet includes both heart and hexagon shaped stamps for more doodling excitement! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 13 x 1 inches; Colors: Yellow, Red, Pink; Weight: 7.7 ounces; Material: BPA-free, non-toxic plastic; Warning: Choking hazard, small parts; Unisex; Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
